prompt: Edit the first image. Keep the surreal blue-neon hexagonal tunnel exactly as is — its geometry, glowing edges, perspective and color palette. Composite the Cadillac from the second reference into the tunnel: the car is driving toward the camera out of the hexagonal corridor, slightly off-center, headlights blazing warm against the cool blue neon. Add the voxel character from the third reference as driver, visible behind the windshield. Vintage lego-block convertible Cadillac, same as in the Cadillac reference: square chrome grille, four glowing headlights, sharp 1970s boxy silhouette, body assembled from lego-like blocks. Driver: small voxel/lego-style figure, light grey/white cubic blocks, dark baseball cap with flat curved brim (NOT a hood). Abstract minimal face. The hexagonal neon light reflects on the car's chrome and paint. Cinematic 16:9, dramatic contrast. Avoid: hooded figure, hoodie, robe, monk, realistic human driver, deformed car, blurry car.
